key_insight: Open-source template matching can accurately index AC-STEM Kikuchi patterns to map crystal orientation at nanoscale using simulated master patterns.
engineering_relevance: This enables higher-resolution, automated grain-orientation characterization for polycrystalline materials relevant to fuel cells and battery cathodes.
method: Generate a master Kikuchi pattern via dynamical simulation in open-source software.
Import the simulated pattern into open-source geometric-simulation/indexing software for template matching.
Use AC-STEM transmission Kikuchi diffraction patterns to perform orientation mapping.
evidence_signal: The method was demonstrated on BZCYYb4411 and LiNiO2, with best-matched simulated patterns showing strong agreement with experimental data despite limited diffraction space.
watch_item: Performance may depend on accurate dynamical simulations and can be sensitive to restricted diffraction geometry in AC-STEM TKD.
paper_title: Orientation Mapping via Dictionary Indexing of AC-STEM Kikuchi patterns using Open-source Software
